response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: No lyrics reference is applicable since the video consists of spoken English dialogue and comedic skits, not vocal music. 2. JSON Usage: The scenes reference was used to identify the boundaries of the two comedic roleplay skits, with manual transcription applied for all spoken English dialogue. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are highly synchronized to the rapid banter, laughter, and high-energy expressions of the VTubers, with fast conversational turn-taking truncated to prevent cascading delays.
